raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing a charge of {$1700.00} from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ), Case ID XXXX, which Citi closed XXXX, XX/XX/year>, finding in favor of the merchant. I am filing this complaint because Citi failed to conduct a reasonable investigation of a charge I did not authorize and did not accept. 
The charge is unauthorized. XXXX XXXX charged my card after I had already returned the vehicle and departed. I was not present during their damage assessment. I did not sign any document accepting liability. XXXXXXXX XXXX own damage report lists " XXXX XXXX '' as my signature and falsely states " Customer has accepted responsibility for the damage. '' A XXXX XXXX is not a signature. I never accepted responsibility for anything. The charge was placed on my card without my knowledge or consent. 
The documentary evidence I submitted to Citi on XX/XX/year> establishes the following none of which appears to have been adequately weighed : First, timestamped photographs taken on XX/XX/year> the day of pickup, at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX show the rear cargo interior lining had already failed before I drove the vehicle anywhere. This damage predates any possible action on my part. 
Second, XXXXXXXX XXXX own Vehicle Condition Report from pickup and their post-return Damage Assessment Report are directly inconsistent with each other. Damage documented at pickup does not appear consistently in the return assessment. A process that can not produce consistent results across XXXX evaluations of the same vehicle can not be a credible basis for holding a customer liable. 
Third, I attended the XXXX drop-off location at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year> within XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX business hours of XXXX specifically to report the interior condition to a staff member. The office was completely closed. I have timestamped photographs documenting this. XXXXXXXX XXXX failure to operate during their own posted hours denied me any opportunity to report the damage or create a contemporaneous record. 
XXXX, XXXXXXXX XXXX damage assessment was conducted more than XXXX hour after I returned the vehicle. During that XXXX XXXX the vehicle was solely in XXXX XXXX possession and control. 
XXXX, XXXX has not provided any itemized repair estimate, invoice, or third-party assessment justifying the {$1700.00} figure. The charge is entirely unsubstantiated.
